create_event.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't host.
create_event.sub: Create an account to throw your own event and put your city on the map.

view_profile.title: Ghosts can browse, but profiles are for members.
view_profile.sub: Create an account to unlock profiles, connect with people, and build your city crew.

join_hangout.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't join hangouts.
join_hangout.sub: Sign up to join hangouts, save your name, and get notified when people want to meet.

create_hangout.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't host.
create_hangout.sub: Sign up to start a hangout, save your name, and get people to join you.

welcome.body: Real people, right now. Say hi, see who's around, or bring a friend in.

imageType: Please select a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
imageTooLarge: Image too large. Max size: 10 MB.

feed.loadErrorSub: Pull to retry later or create something new in {{city}}.
feed.emptyLocalSub: Make {{city}} feel alive. Start a recurring event at your favorite place.
feed.emptySub: Be the first to make something happen in {{city}}
feed.noEventsSub: Be the first to create one in {{city}}
feed.noHangoutsSub: Start a hangout and get the city talking
